contexts.context: NW: DN proposed that having a <mark>co-chair</mark> would look better. He suggested CSM and CSM…
CSM: I’m committing to <mark>co-chair</mark> for the next year, I plan to review…
…perception, then I’d be happy to be a <mark>co-chair</mark>.
…sense for CSM and NW to be listed as <mark>co-chairs</mark> now and for us to review this later on…
…That’s something that NW and I can do as <mark>co-chairs</mark>.
